calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Silverman, via ZOOM, for John T. Jury, Administrator.

The court begins by confirming with counsel that the Administrator retained unlawful detainer counsel and paid counsel's fees using estate funds without prior court approval and that the court is considering deducting the fees from Nathan Jury's distribution. Counsel advises that the funds had been inadvertently used to hire UD counsel and apologizes to the court for doing so. Counsel also reports that Nathan Jury will not object to the court's proposal. The court then turns to counsel's request for extraordinary compensation. Counsel provides oral testimony to support his request for compensation of extraordinary fees.

After additional discussion, the Accounting Petition is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Off Calendar May-12-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-14-2021 Continued To May-12-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Robert Silverman appeared by telephone for Petitioner.

The Court noted that a recent filing is pending and asked Counsel what was filed. Mr. Silverman apologized to the Court, stated that they were scrambling, that this was a long and complicated petition, and that he filed a final accounting petition yesterday afternoon. Status on close of estate is continued to May 12, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Silverman that if the pending petition is accepted, this status hearing will go off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
